query: SELECT p.id, p.name, GROUP_CONCAT(c.name) as consultants FROM projects p LEFT JOIN projectConsultants pc ON p.id = pc.projectId LEFT JOIN consultants c ON pc.consultantId = c.id GROUP BY p.id, p.name;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4E8R6wFgxnBhGVF.1a403e654cd7 --database Q366eAYG4Q7iaM8VuAmmFX --execute SELECT p.id, p.name, GROUP_CONCAT(c.name) as consultants FROM projects p LEFT JOIN projectConsultants pc ON p.id = pc.projectId LEFT JOIN consultants c ON pc.consultantId = c.id GROUP BY p.id, p.name;
